quality_highlights: network_firewall_validation.go: Exemplary error messages with ✓/✗ inline examples, specific messages for each domain validation error case.
logs_command.go: Short description is precise and informative — tells users what the command does and what the output provides.

single_file_improvements.issue: Line 52: 28 report sections listed as a dense comma-separated sentence with no grouping or visual hierarchy. Restructure as a grouped table.

Line 23: run-failure message uses {status} which renders raw GitHub Actions conclusion strings (timed_out, failure, cancelled). Same pattern as approach-validator.md flagged 2026-04-24. Replace with fixed human-readable phrase.
